subcodes.first_line: O Lord, O Forgiver! Make of this abashed servant one filled with hope, make him beneficent through the outpouring of Thy oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پروردگارا آمرزگارا بنده شرمنده یی امیدوار ایله نیکوکار ایله فیض احدیتدن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @humility; meekness; lowliness
